prompt: Create a dynamic cinematic vertical illustration of a futuristic super heroine flying at high speed above a dense neon city at night. The subject is a young blonde cyber super heroine, shown in a dramatic close-up wide-angle perspective as if she is rushing directly toward the camera, one armored fist extended forward and the other arm back. She has blonde hair styled into two high twin ponytails with braided roots, long strands whipping in the wind, blue eyes, a confident mischievous smile, and an athletic anime-inspired physique. Her outfit is a glossy white and silver sci-fi battle suit: segmented metallic chest armor, shoulder plates, forearm gauntlets, small waist armor, mechanical belt details, thigh-high futuristic boots, and glowing blue jet thrusters on her boots and backpack-like rear propulsion units. Add a translucent green visor across her eyes, silver headset-like side fins, polished chrome panels, tiny screws and seams, blue LED accents, and realistic reflections on the armor. The background is a sprawling skyscraper city seen far below with countless blue, white, and red window lights, motion blur from speed, a dark cloudy night sky, and a bright full moon in the upper left. Use moonlit cyberpunk blue lighting, intense rim light, high contrast, volumetric glow, cool metallic highlights, and vivid electric-blue jet trails streaming downward and behind her. Composition should be vertical 9:16, tilted diagonal action pose, ultra-detailed, sharp face and armor, cinematic realism mixed with stylized superhero fantasy, no text, no logo, no watermark.
promptEn: Create a dynamic cinematic vertical illustration of a futuristic super heroine flying at high speed above a dense neon city at night. The subject is a young blonde cyber super heroine, shown in a dramatic close-up wide-angle perspective as if she is rushing directly toward the camera, one armored fist extended forward and the other arm back. She has blonde hair styled into two high twin ponytails with braided roots, long strands whipping in the wind, blue eyes, a confident mischievous smile, and an athletic anime-inspired physique. Her outfit is a glossy white and silver sci-fi battle suit: segmented metallic chest armor, shoulder plates, forearm gauntlets, small waist armor, mechanical belt details, thigh-high futuristic boots, and glowing blue jet thrusters on her boots and backpack-like rear propulsion units. Add a translucent green visor across her eyes, silver headset-like side fins, polished chrome panels, tiny screws and seams, blue LED accents, and realistic reflections on the armor. The background is a sprawling skyscraper city seen far below with countless blue, white, and red window lights, motion blur from speed, a dark cloudy night sky, and a bright full moon in the upper left. Use moonlit cyberpunk blue lighting, intense rim light, high contrast, volumetric glow, cool metallic highlights, and vivid electric-blue jet trails streaming downward and behind her. Composition should be vertical 9:16, tilted diagonal action pose, ultra-detailed, sharp face and armor, cinematic realism mixed with stylized superhero fantasy, no text, no logo, no watermark.
promptZh: 创作一张充满动感的电影级垂直插画，描绘一位未来感超级女英雄在夜晚密集的霓虹城市上空高速飞行。主体为 一位金发赛博超级女英雄，采用戏剧性的广角特写视角，仿佛她正径直冲向镜头，一只装甲拳头向前伸展，另一只手臂向后摆动。她拥有 金色 的头发，梳成两个高双马尾，发根编织，长发丝在风中飘动，蓝色的眼睛，自信而调皮的微笑，以及充满运动感的动漫风格体格。她的服装是光泽的白色和银色科幻战斗服：分段式金属胸甲、肩甲、前臂护手、小型腰甲、机械腰带细节、及膝未来感长靴，靴子和类似背包的后部推进装置上带有发光的蓝色喷气推进器。在她的眼睛上添加一个半透明的绿色护目镜，银色耳机状侧翼，抛光的铬金属面板，细小的螺丝和接缝，蓝色 LED 点缀，以及装甲上逼真的反射。背景是远在下方延伸的摩天大楼城市，有无数蓝色、白色和红色的窗户灯光，速度带来的动态模糊，深色的多云夜空，以及左上方的一轮明月。使用 月光下的赛博朋克蓝色灯光，强烈的轮廓光，高对比度，体积光，冷色调金属高光，以及向下方和身后流动的生动电蓝色喷气轨迹。构图应为 9:16 垂直比例，倾斜的对角线动作姿态，超高细节，面部和装甲清晰，电影级写实与风格化超级英雄幻想相结合，无文字，无 Logo，无水印。
